arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the launch template.

block_device_mappings.description: Block device mappings of the launch template specifying the volumes to attach to the instance.

capacity_reservation_specification.description: Specification for capacity reservations in the launch template.

cpu_options.description: CPU options for the instance, such as the number of cores and threads per core.

credit_specification.description: Credit specification for burstable performance instances.

default_version.description: The default version of the launch template.

disable_api_stop.description: If true, the instance cannot be stopped using the API.

disable_api_termination.description: If true, the instance cannot be terminated using the API.

ebs_optimized.description: Indicates whether the instance is optimized for Amazon EBS I/O.

elastic_gpu_specifications.description: Specifications for elastic GPUs to attach to the instance.

enclave_options.description: Options for enabling or disabling enclave options for the instance.

hibernation_options.description: Options for enabling or disabling hibernation for the instance.

iam_instance_profile.description: The IAM instance profile associated with the instance.

id.description: The ID of the launch template.

image_id.description: The ID of the AMI to use for the instance.

instance_initiated_shutdown_behavior.description: The behavior when an instance is shut down: stop or terminate.

instance_market_options.description: Options for configuring the market (such as Spot) for the instance.

instance_requirements.description: Specifications for the instance requirements, such as memory, CPU, and storage.

instance_type.description: The type of instance to use.

kernel_id.description: The ID of the kernel to use for the instance.

key_name.description: The name of the key pair to use for the instance.

latest_version.description: The latest version of the launch template.

license_specification.description: The license configurations to associate with the instance.

maintenance_options.description: Options for instance maintenance, such as auto-recovery.

metadata_options.description: Options for instance metadata service configuration.

monitoring.description: Indicates whether detailed monitoring is enabled for the instance.

name.description: The name of the launch template.

network_interfaces.description: Configuration options for network interfaces to attach to the instance.

placement.description: Placement options for the instance, such as availability zone and tenancy.

private_dns_name_options.description: Options for the private DNS name of the instance.

ram_disk_id.description: The ID of the RAM disk to use for the instance.

security_group_names.description: Names of the security groups associated with the instance.

tag_specifications.description: Tag specifications to apply to resources created by the launch template.

tags.description: Tags assigned to the launch template.

user_data.description: User data script to configure the instance at launch.

vpc_security_group_ids.description: IDs of the VPC security groups associated with the instance.
